title: MassAbility Reasonable-Accommodation Requests by Month and Outcome (PRR Response, 2023-2026)
description: Machine-readable normalization of an official PRR-produced Excel workbook titled 'EHS PRR 2026.05.13 - W Vizcaino - RA Requests Data- J.P.P. 5.21.26.xlsx'. The workbook reports monthly MassAbility reasonable-accommodation request counts by outcome (Approved, Denied, Pending, Withdrawn) from January 2023 through May 2026, with quarterly, yearly, and grand-total rollups. This CSV keeps only the monthly rows, fills blank outcome cells as 0, and verifies each row total against the workbook total column; the source workbook grand total is 371 requests.

columns.name: agency
columns.description: Agency named in the workbook; all rows are MassAbility.

columns.name: year
columns.description: Calendar year from the workbook pivot table.

columns.name: quarter
columns.description: Calendar quarter derived from the workbook's Qtr1-Qtr4 grouping.

columns.name: month
columns.description: Three-letter month label from the workbook.

columns.name: month_start
columns.description: ISO month-start date added during normalization for sorting and charting.

columns.name: approved
columns.description: Count of reasonable-accommodation requests marked Approved for the month.

columns.name: denied
columns.description: Count of reasonable-accommodation requests marked Denied for the month.

columns.name: pending
columns.description: Count of reasonable-accommodation requests marked Pending for the month.

columns.name: withdrawn
columns.description: Count of reasonable-accommodation requests marked Withdrawn for the month.

columns.name: total
columns.description: Monthly total; equals approved + denied + pending + withdrawn.

geographic_coverage: Massachusetts (MassAbility statewide; office-level split not provided)

source.title: EHS PRR 2026.05.13 - W Vizcaino - RA Requests Data- J.P.P. 5.21.26.xlsx

update_cadence: One-time PRR response; refresh only if a later production supersedes or extends the workbook.
notes: Source workbook preserved as data/prr-responses/2026-05-21-ehs-ra-requests-data.source.xlsx. The workbook is a pivot-style sheet ('Total MonthlyYearly RA') with monthly rows plus quarterly/yearly totals. This normalized CSV excludes total rows to avoid double-counting. Blank outcome cells are interpreted as 0. The source workbook appears to include May 2026 as of the PRR production date, so May 2026 should be treated as a production-date snapshot unless MassAbility confirms it is a full-month total. Reconciliation: monthly totals sum to Approved=202, Denied=69, Pending=8, Withdrawn=92, Grand Total=371, matching the workbook.
